name: @agent-iris/hermes-agent-channel
description: hermes-agent plugin for agent-iris — connects iris server to hermes-agent via WebSocket

scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --sourcemap=external --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' && chmod +x dist/index.js && tsc --noEmit
